prerequisites.value: Improved Planar Mentor, Planar Mentor, character level 13th.

description.value: **Benefit:** You can benefit from your Planar Mentor feat one additional time per day. You add the following to the list of spell-like abilities you can cast using Improved Planar Mentor for their respective alignments, each of which affects only a single target within 30 feet: blasphemy (evil), dictum (lawful), holy word (good), slay living (neutral), and word of chaos (chaotic). Once per week you can cast greater planar ally as a spell-like ability, but only to conjure your planar mentor. Your mentor requires only half the normal payment for its services.
